title: trollius patulus var. subinvolucratus
intro: Trollius patulus var. subinvolucratus, commonly known as the Alpine Globe-flower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Trollius patulus var. subinvolucratus is typically prepared in herbal tea, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
